concept: My email is NOT an emergency
title: Funny 'My Email Is NOT An Emergency' Sarcastic Work Burnout T-Shirt
description:
Tired of people treating your inbox like it's the ER? This design hilariously calls out the absurdity of email urgency while keeping your sarcasm game strong. It's the perfect way to remind everyone that you're setting boundaries, one witty slogan at a time. 

Perfect for:
- Professionals who are over the 'ASAP' culture
- Work-life balance champions
- Introverts who hate notifications
- Anyone who wishes email had a snooze button

DETAILS:
- Available in light and dark color options to suit your mood
- Bold typography design with a touch of rebellion
- Made-to-order with premium print quality
- The slogan reads 'My Email Is NOT An Emergency.'

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
